hero.title: Water Intake Tracker
hero.description: Log daily hydration, personal goals, drink types, and intake history in a private wellness tracker.

flow.title: Log -> Compare -> Review
steps: Set a personal daily water goal and preferred unit
Add water entries with date, time, amount, unit, drink type, and notes
Review today, week, and month summaries from stored entries
Track trends without medical advice or health outcome claims

differences.title: A personal hydration log, not medical guidance
differences.description: Water Intake Tracker keeps user-entered hydration records organized without diagnosing, prescribing, or replacing healthcare guidance.

items.title: Quick entry logging
items.description: Capture amount, unit, drink type, date, time, and notes.

items.title: Goal progress
items.description: Compare daily intake against a user-managed personal goal.

items.title: Simple summaries
items.description: Review daily, weekly, monthly, streak, and drink-type summaries from saved records.

feel.title: A calm daily hydration notebook
feel.description: The workflow favors fast logging, clear progress, and practical history review.

items.title: Fast to update
items.description: Add entries as drinks happen or edit them later.

items.title: Easy to review
items.description: Use summaries and filters to understand stored hydration patterns.

items.title: Clear boundaries
items.description: The app does not give medical advice, prescribe intake, or claim health outcomes.

audiences.title: Who uses Water Intake Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for people who want a private personal record of hydration habits.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Track daily water intake against personal goals.

items.title: Routine builders
items.description: Review recent entries and consistency over time.

items.title: Wellness organizers
items.description: Separate hydration records from medical decisions and professional guidance.

resourceSection.title: Water tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep hydration records practical and searchable.

items.title: Entries
items.description: Create, edit, delete, search, and filter water intake records.

items.title: Goals
items.description: Set a personal daily goal and preferred unit.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review today's intake, weekly/monthly averages, best day, streak, trend, and drink type totals.

groupedSection.title: From daily log to useful history
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for personal hydration tracking.

items.name: Amount and unit
items.description: Store entries in milliliters or liters with conversion for summaries.

items.name: Drink type
items.description: Use default drink types or custom labels.

items.name: Goal progress
items.description: See consumed, remaining, percentage, and achieved status.

items.name: History filters
items.description: Search and filter entries by date range or drink type.

technicalSection.title: Built for private personal records
technicalSection.description: Water Intake Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: API-driven overview metadata and generated API contracts.
No medical advice, diagnosis, prescription, emergency support, wearable integration, or health outcome claims.

finalCta.title: Ready to log hydration?
finalCta.description: Open the tracker and add the first water entry.
